19
20
21
22
23
24
25
26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @shlives did this piece not long ago. Check out their posts for some great work they've done!
27 Man Tax: Sebastian Stan
“Never be afraid to raise your voice for honesty and truth and compassion, against injustice and lying and greed.” - William Faulkner I try to keep my posts "good vibe zones". So, instead of finding the one thing in here you don't like and commenting only on that, also comment about something you DID like. Balance the negativity. Love you long time. So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We're also setting up Jack Box game night and movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, thank you so much.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Her name is Anja Ringgren Lovén and she is an amazing Danish lady. She helps children without clothes on the streets somewhere in Africa, abandoned and starving, takes them in to new starts in life One is named Hope.

item.title: Don't fuck with Reuters
item.description: Check out this video essay Reuters released yesterday detailing the IDF's double shellings targeting a cameraman. They reviewed over a hundred videos from the scene, consulted munitions experts and interviewed more than two dozen people to show exactly what happened, as well as when, where, and how it happened, leading to an undeniable conclusion about why it happened. https://youtu.be/nXZkLHtDWHU?si=4FniTaXIZI4Okapu They've murdered around 200 journalists so far.
item.dc:creator: rolliefingers

item.title: CHIN-UP: Resistance isn't futile or meaningless.
item.description: Even if you fall, you inspire others to take a stand, and even more importantly is that you did the right thing. Fight and keep up the hope. Remember to be good to yourself and help those close to you. Don't let the constant negative news bring you down.
item.dc:creator: Mirrormancer

item.title: Wild that words have definitions and stuff
item.dc:creator: Huor

item.description:
I have been trying so hard because I need to lose weight. I have a couple different issues with my back. Facet Atrophy, basically progressive disease of the vertebrae. Caused from my back injury from my cousin when I was 11. He pushed me from a tree. Also a couple other issues but I've barely been managing. I'm just happy to be under 260 again.
Fuck ya, 19 more pounds before I can have surgery. Edit: I'm at work right now, I made this post between runs of getting cars. The joys of being a driver for a rental car agency. Y'all are fucking amazing and I appreciate it a lot. I've been working my ass off and trying to stay on a strict diet and it's been so hard. Edit 2: This post gained a lot of traction. I really appreciate all the support. It really does mean a lot and helps this gal out. It's been an incredibly difficult task. The last push is to get down to 175, that's my goal and I have to maintain a weight below 30 BMI in order to remove all this extra skin I have. Right now I'm scheduled to have bariatric surgery, I've done everything on the list for it beside the neurologist visit but that's because they can't get me in until March 2026. So I said fuck it and have been pushing myself harder to lose the weight without having the weight loss surgery. I still need the back surgery though and that's why I need to get below 240lbs by the New year, so I can have surgery to fix my damn back issues and hopefully walk without a cane anymore and have the other issues I have been experiencing, some of which are incredibly embarrassing. BUT THIS GAL IS NOT FUCKING GIVING UP. I WILL HIT 240LBS BEFORE THE NEW YEAR DAMNIT! Also where is the unit convert bot when you need them?
item.dc:creator: LustyLombax

item.title: When Your School's Field Day Means Going Outside for the Rapture so You are Not Stuck on the Ceiling ...
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1488 (Sunday Wizardposting)
item.description:
Let's conjure this bread.
Bronze-age Wizard bonus (as always with pictures of me in garb, you're welcome to meme)
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "I love you too. Morning." ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: GovBrief Today #240
item.description: ⛔Trump controls Congress, the courts, and the executive branch, but still governs through threats. Federal workers face mass firing warnings, Portland gets unwanted troops, foreign leaders lose visas for dissent, educators lose jobs for speaking freely, all while his family turns the White House into a fashion shoot that he then travels to a golf tournament to help promote. When you have all the power but still rule through fear and greed, you're admitting your agenda can't win on its merits. Do not let him and the GOP rewrite history. Donald Trump's supporters broke into our Capitol, erected a gallows, hurt police officers, and even used public areas as toilets. You saw it with your own eyes, probably as it unfurled minute by minute. Correct the people around you spreading the lies. And don't leave truth to the algorithm. Our free and private nightly email arms you with images, data, and quotes so you can see it all for yourself. Add your email at govbrief dot today or on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com [1] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-deploy-troops-portland [2] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-lies-jan6-fbi [3] https://go.govbrief.today/us-revokes-petro-visa [4] https://go.govbrief.today/shutdown-talks-congressional-leaders [5] https://go.govbrief.today/des-moines-superintendent-leave [6] https://go.govbrief.today/abrego-garcia-transfer-pennsylvania [7] https://go.govbrief.today/cpb-pushes-trump-order [8] https://go.govbrief.today/kai-trump-teen-fashion [9] https://go.govbrief.today/educators-file-suit-dismissals Back later to read comments. Y'all have an amazing Sunday!
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
